sqlMap.select: select * from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AuditAttestService(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ClientNameAas ClientIndustryAasKey ServiceIndustryAasKey TypeOfServiceAas TypeOfAuditOpinionAas GoingConcernReferenceAas NonMonetaryCompensationAas ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ClientNameAas# #ClientIndustryAasKey# #ServiceIndustryAasKey# #TypeOfServiceAas# #TypeOfAuditOpinionAas# #GoingConcernReferenceAas# #NonMonetaryCompensationAas# )
sqlMap.select: select ClientNameAas, ClientIndustryAasKey, ServiceIndustryAasKey, TypeOfServiceAas, TypeOfAuditOpinionAas, GoingConcernReferenceAas, NonMonetaryCompensationAas, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AuditAttestService set
ClientNameAas = #ClientNameAas# ClientNameAas = null ClientIndustryAasKey = #ClientIndustryAasKey# ClientIndustryAasKey = null ServiceIndustryAasKey = #ServiceIndustryAasKey# ServiceIndustryAasKey = null TypeOfServiceAas = #TypeOfServiceAas# TypeOfServiceAas = null TypeOfAuditOpinionAas = #TypeOfAuditOpinionAas# TypeOfAuditOpinionAas = null GoingConcernReferenceAas = #GoingConcernReferenceAas# GoingConcernReferenceAas = null NonMonetaryCompensationAas = #NonMonetaryCompensationAas# NonMonetaryCompensationAas = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ClientNameAas, ClientIndustryAasKey, ServiceIndustryAasKey, TypeOfServiceAas, TypeOfAuditOpinionAas, GoingConcernReferenceAas, NonMonetaryCompensationAas, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ClientNameAas, ClientIndustryAasKey, ServiceIndustryAasKey, TypeOfServiceAas, TypeOfAuditOpinionAas, GoingConcernReferenceAas, NonMonetaryCompensationAas from AuditAttestService where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
